title: CF_DocCentralV3_CloseRegistryYear — Trigger Input Schema
description: Inputs passed from the Canvas App to the CloseRegistryYear flow via Power Apps V2 trigger. This is an irreversible operation.

yearToClose.description: The year to close. Must match the currently active year in App Config. The flow re-validates this — the Canvas App value is not trusted alone.

initiatorEmail.description: Email of the user performing the year closing. Written to ClosedBy in App Config.

correlationId.description: Optional correlation ID for log tracing. If empty or omitted, the flow generates a GUID.

irreversibilityNote: This operation cannot be undone. The year-closed flag is set permanently. No flow or admin action can reopen a closed year. The Canvas App must present a confirmation step before calling this flow.

callerNotes.preValidation: The Canvas App year-closing screen should show the user: count of non-archived documents and count of reserved numbers. These are informational — the flow re-validates authoritatively before executing.
callerNotes.yearSource: The Canvas App should read the active year from App Config and pre-populate the yearToClose field. The user should confirm the displayed year before submitting.
callerNotes.authorization: The Canvas App is responsible for restricting access to this screen to admin users only. The flow does not perform role-based authorization checks.
callerNotes.concurrency: Only one user should be able to submit year closing at a time. The Canvas App should disable the submit button after first click to prevent double-submission. The ETag-based If-Match on the App Config item provides a final safety net.

canvasAppCall.note: varActiveYear is an integer variable set from App Config. The Canvas App shows the year for confirmation before calling.
